title: mypy: 11 import-not-found errors (textual missing)
description:
11 import-not-found errors for textual module:
- src/lichen/tui/app.py (5 imports)
- src/lichen/tui/native.py (6 imports)

Fix: Install textual in dev dependencies or add it to optional[tui] extras, or add # type: ignore[import-not-found] if TUI is optional.
